tasks.title: Audit AI Call Implementations in AI Tutor Feature
tasks.description: Review and verify the AI call implementations in the AI Tutor feature located in apps/web/src/features/ai-tutor/. Ensure that all calls to AI services use the real AI client from @ielts/ai or @ielts/ai-tutor packages, not mocks or placeholders. Identify any usage of mock AI or stub implementations and document them for correction.
acceptanceCriteria: All AI calls in AI Tutor feature use real AI client imports
No mock or stub AI calls remain in the AI Tutor feature
tasks.expectedResult: A report or code annotations confirming all AI calls in AI Tutor feature use the real AI client

outputPlan.description: Code files updated to ensure real AI client usage

metadata.inputContext: Project source code and AI Tutor feature implementation
targetArtifacts: AI call audit report for AI Tutor feature
evidence: Test suite for AI Tutor passes
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures AI Tutor feature calls real AI services correctly

tasks.title: Implement Corrections to Replace Mock AI Calls with Real AI Calls
tasks.description: Based on audit findings from previous tasks, modify all identified mock or placeholder AI calls in all AI-related features to use the real AI client implementations from the appropriate packages (@ielts/ai, @ielts/ai-tutor, etc.). Ensure proper imports, API usage, and error handling consistent with project conventions.
acceptanceCriteria: All mock AI calls replaced with real AI client calls
Unit and integration tests pass for AI features
tasks.expectedResult: All AI features call the real AI services correctly and pass tests

outputPlan.description: AI Tutor feature code updated to use real AI client
Exercise Generator feature code updated to use real AI client
Vocabulary feature code updated to use real AI client if applicable

metadata.inputContext: Audit reports and code analysis from previous tasks
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures all AI features call real AI services correctly

tasks.title: Run Full Test Suite to Validate All Features Work Correctly with Real AI Calls
tasks.description: Execute the full test suite including unit, integration, and end-to-end tests to verify that all features, especially those involving AI calls, work correctly with the real AI services. Confirm no regressions or failures occur due to the AI call changes.
acceptanceCriteria: No runtime errors or warnings related to AI calls
tasks.expectedResult: Full test suite passes confirming all features work correctly with real AI calls

metadata.inputContext: Codebase with real AI calls implemented
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Validates that all features function correctly with real AI calls
